scripts.dev:iphone: npm run stop:metro && set NODE_ENV=development&& npx expo start --dev-client --lan --scheme proparcel --port 8081
scripts.start:ios-dev: set NODE_ENV=development&& npx expo start --dev-client --lan --scheme proparcel --port 8081
scripts.start:ios-dev:tunnel: set NODE_ENV=development&& npx expo start --dev-client --tunnel --scheme proparcel --port 8081
scripts.metro:fg: npm run stop:metro && set NODE_ENV=development&& set CI=&& npx expo start --clear --dev-client --lan --scheme proparcel --port 8081
scripts.android:embed-models: npm run gen:model-packs-manifest && npm run gen:android-asset-packs && npm run gen:debug-assets-models
scripts.build:apk:no-models: npm run clear:android-asset-packs && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:with-models: npm run android:embed-models && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:bundle:no-models: node ./scripts/sync-android-mapbox-token.js --strict && npm run clear:android-asset-packs && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease && cd .. && node ./scripts/copy-release-aab.js --variant=no-models
scripts.build:bundle:with-models: node ./scripts/sync-android-mapbox-token.js --strict && npm run gen:model-packs-manifest && npm run refresh:android-asset-packs && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease && cd .. && node ./scripts/copy-release-aab.js --variant=with-models
scripts.prebuild:android: set EXPO_ANDROID_RN_CLI=1&& npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node ./scripts/apply-android-native-fix.js
scripts.prebuild:android:safe: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/unlock-android-folder.ps1 && set EXPO_ANDROID_RN_CLI=1&& npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node ./scripts/apply-android-native-fix.js
scripts.android:reinstall: npm run android:usb && npm run android:run-only
scripts.eas:inspect:ios: npm run eas:sync-env && npm run clean:eas-upload && npm run clean:eas-temp && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& set NODE_ENV=development&& eas build:inspect --platform ios --stage archive --profile development --output %TEMP%\eas-archive-inspect
scripts.eas:build:ios: npm run check:brand-assets && npm run eas:sync-env && npm run clean:eas-upload && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& set NODE_ENV=development&& eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.eas:configure-ios-store: set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& eas credentials:configure-build -p ios -e production
scripts.eas:release:ios: npm run check:brand-assets && npm run eas:sync-env && npm run clean:eas-upload && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& set NODE_ENV=production&& set EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true&& eas build --platform ios --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.eas:store:ios: npm run eas:release:ios && npm run eas:submit:ios
scripts.eas:release:android: npm run eas:sync-env && npm run clean:eas-upload && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& set NODE_ENV=production&& set EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true&& eas build --platform android --profile production --non-interactive
scripts.eas:ios: npm run eas:sync-env && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:ios:preview: npm run eas:sync-env && npm run clean:eas-upload && set EAS_NO_VCS=1&& eas build --platform ios --profile preview --non-interactive
scripts.preandroid: npm run copy:icon-fonts && node ./scripts/sync-android-mapbox-token.js && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/android-dev-prepare.ps1
scripts.preandroid:local: npm run copy:icon-fonts && node ./scripts/sync-android-mapbox-token.js && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/android-dev-prepare.ps1
scripts.preandroid:run-only: npm run copy:icon-fonts && node ./scripts/sync-android-mapbox-token.js && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/android-dev-prepare.ps1
